DEFT MOTION TO SUPPRESS PC 1538,5 FILED

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING BEFORE JUDGE GORDON/WITEXCL: DEFENSE/INVOFF: SFPD SERGEANT PAUL DOHERTY/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER MARKO RADIN/WIT SWORNDA: SFPD OFFICER BRIAN BARRON/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD SERGEANT PAUL DOHERTY/X:THERE WERE NO EXHIBITS MARKED OR ADMITTED DURING THIS PROCEEDING,/ARG&SUB/X: THE DEFENSE'S PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE IS DENIED,/X:  THE DEFENSE'S ORAL PC 17(B) MOTION TO REDUCE CHARGE(S) TO MISDEMEANOR(S) IS DENIED,/HTA1: 1 & 2 /X: THE COURT'S FINDINGS AS TO ALLEGATION(S) ARE SET FORTH ON THE RECORD,/X: COUNT(S) 3 CERTIFIED AS MISDEMEANOR(S),/DEF: REMAINS OUT OF CUSTODY ON ASSERTIVE CASE MANAGEMENT (ACM)/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT ONTHE INFORMATION IN DEPT 22 ON 06-28-2022/DOP/S22/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS, LD 05-24-22 (10TH), LD 07-11-22 (60TH), TE 1 HOUR/X: DA ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE PC 1050GRANTED (WITNESS UNAVAILABLE)/CAUSE/X: DEFENSE'S ORAL MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS GRANTED/EMMOD: HOME DETENTION TERMINATED,  GPS ELECTRONIC MONITORING AND ACM CONDITIONS REMAIN/CONT/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 05-24-22 (10TH)/X: COURT ESTABLISHES 60TH DAY AS 07-11-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND SHALL BE ON PRE-TRIAL HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD ANDBY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING 05-24-22 DEPT 11/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 10/TRANS 10:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
